Athletics & Clinic Hub

Index for Crestwood track, Iron City Sports Medicine, and personal coaching spaces. Start here to find protocols, the meet schedule, the roster, and recruiting docs.
title: Athletics & Clinic Hub Home

body:
Crestwood Track

Crestwood High track & field program docs. Home page for this space.
title: Crestwood Track Home

body:
Crestwood Track & Field

AHSAA Class 6A program at Crestwood High. Head coach Shannon Perry, assistant Demetrius Washington. Practice Mon-Fri 3:00-5:30 PM. This space holds the roster, meet plans, and coaching docs.
title: Crestwood Track Program Overview

body:
Season Goals

  • Devon Mitchell: sub-21.5 200m, D1 commitment
  • Qualify a relay and 3+ individuals for state
  • Keep the whole roster academically eligible
  • Stay healthy - manage hamstrings and shins early
title: Season Goals 2026-2027

body:
Rehab Protocols

ACL, hamstring, and ankle return-to-sport protocols. Home page for this space.
title: Rehab Protocols Home

body:
ACL Return-to-Sport

Criteria-based progression for post-op ACL athletes. Gates: full ROM, quad index >90%, hop testing LSI >90%, sport-specific agility, psychological readiness before full sprint return. Currently applied to Trey Dawson at month 8.
title: ACL Return-to-Sport Protocol

body:
Hamstring Strain Protocol

Extender, Diver, and Glider eccentric exercises. Progress to running when pain-free walking, then graded sprint return. Applied to Devon Mitchell's grade 1 strain.
title: Hamstring Strain Protocol (Askling L-Protocol)

body:
Ankle Sprain Protocol

PEACE & LOVE early management, then ankle ROM, balance/proprioception, and return-to-run. Applied to Isaiah Bell's grade 2 lateral sprain.
title: Lateral Ankle Sprain Protocol

body:
Devon Recruiting

Devon Mitchell D1 recruiting plan and contacts. Home page for this space.
title: Devon Recruiting Home

body:
Devon Recruiting Plan

Senior sprinter, 100m 10.62 / 200m 21.4. Target programs: Auburn, South Alabama, Troy, Tuskegee, Jacksonville State, Samford. Unofficial visit to South Alabama Dec 5. Update marks after the MLK Indoor Classic.
title: Devon Mitchell Recruiting Plan

body:
Eligibility Checklist

  • Register with NCAA Eligibility Center
  • Core-course GPA on track (currently 3.4)
  • SAT/ACT scheduled
  • Transcript sent to interested programs
title: NCAA Eligibility Checklist

body:
Sprint Program

Sprint mechanics, drills, and speed development. Home page for this space.
title: Sprint Program Home

body:
Sprint Mechanics Cues

Acceleration: patient rise, push the track, big shin angles. Max velocity: tall posture, front-side mechanics, relaxed hands. Block start: stay low through three steps. Curve: lean from ankles, tight inside arm.
title: Sprint Mechanics Cue Sheet

body:
Drill Library

  • Wall drives
  • A-skip / B-skip
  • Fly-in sprints
  • Block starts to 30m
  • Resisted sled pushes
  • Flying 30s with timing gates
title: Speed Development Drill Library

body:
Sunday Dinner & Church

New Hope AME and Brenda's Sunday dinner planning. Home page for this space.
title: Sunday Dinner & Church Home

body:
Sunday Dinner

2 PM at Brenda's after the 9:30 service. Shannon smokes brisket and ribs, Mom handles sides and greens, Keisha brings cobbler. Family gathers - Keisha, Marcus, the kids, and Uncle Ray.
title: Sunday Dinner Rotation

body:
Holiday Planning

  • Oct 17: cemetery visit then dinner at Mom's
  • Nov 26: Thanksgiving at Brenda's, smoked turkey
  • Dec 14: Shannon's birthday dinner
  • Dec 25: Christmas service and dinner
  • Dec 31: Watch Night, New Year brunch
title: Holiday Planning

Team Roster

Sprints: Devon Mitchell, Kayla Simmons, Tre Donaldson. Hurdles: Isaiah Bell. Distance: Marcus Reed. Jumps: Jordan Pruitt. Throws: Brandon Settles. Returning from injury: Trey Dawson (ACL).

Meet Planning

AHSAA 6A meet schedule and meet-day logistics. Home page for this space.

body:
Meet Schedule

Oct 24 XC Invitational (Oak Mountain), Dec 12 indoor opener (CrossPlex), Jan 17 MLK Indoor Classic, Feb 13 season opener (home), Mar 6 Buc Relays, Mar 27 sectional qualifier. Bus and entry logistics per meet.
title: Meet Schedule and Logistics

Weight room cycles and lifting programs. Home page for this space.

body:
Strength Cycle

Hypertrophy to strength to power blocks, peaking before season opener. Core lifts: trapbar deadlift, back squat, hang clean, Nordic curls, loaded jumps. Tre on box squats until knee cleared.
title: Strength Cycle Plan

Iron City Clinic

Iron City Sports Medicine clinical notes. Home page for this space.
title: Iron City Clinic Home

body:
Iron City Caseload

Outpatient sports-rehab cases: post-op ACL, rotator cuff tendinopathy, ankle sprains, patellofemoral pain, low back pain, post-TKR. Shannon (DPT, SCS) and Dr. Anita Lawson sharing the schedule.
title: Clinic Caseload Notes

Film Review

Slow-mo breakdowns: Devon block start, Kayla 200m bend, Isaiah 110H three-step, 4x100 handoffs, Jordan long-jump approach. Cues shared with athletes after each session.

Recovery & Mobility

body:
Recovery

Post-practice cooldown jog and stretch, foam rolling, hip and ankle mobility, contrast baths after hard sessions, pre-meet activation. Monitor sleep and soreness before hard days.

Meal-prep plans and athlete fueling. Home page for this space.

Meal Prep

Sunday cook for the week: grilled chicken, rice, broccoli; overnight oats for early runs; turkey chili for cold weather. Publix groceries via Instacart. Athlete fueling tips for meet days.
title: Meal Prep Plan

Shannon's mileage, workouts, and race build. Home page for this space.

body:
Running Log

Building for the Mercedes-Benz Half on Feb 6. 5:15 AM weekday runs on the Crestwood South loop, Saturday long runs, tempo and hill work. Goal 1:38. Iron City Charity 5K on Nov 8 as a tune-up.
title: Half Marathon Build

Iron City Charity 5K

Charity 5K planning and volunteers. Home page for this space.

body:
Iron City Charity 5K

Nov 8 at Railroad Park. Packet pickup 6:30 AM, race at 8. Need 10 finish-line volunteers, sponsor banner, 250 bibs, water stations, and a medical tent. Proceeds to a senior scholarship.
title: Charity 5K Run of Show

Personal Notes

Reminders and drafts: annual physical with Dr. Marcus Grant Nov 15, student-loan and 401(k) review on the 1st, half-marathon training, and Sunday dinner ideas. Keep faith, family, and coaching in balance.

body:
Weekly Schedule

5:15 AM run, 7:00 AM-1:30 PM clinic, 3:00-5:30 PM track practice, Devon 1:1 sprint sessions Tue/Thu 5:30 PM, Saturday long run, Sunday service and dinner. Monthly finance review on the 1st.
title: Weekly Schedule Template
